message:
fix(core): correct NULL propagation and overflow semantics in expression evaluators

The HAVING and JOIN binary expression evaluators used local helper
functions (numeric_add/sub/mul) that:
- used wrapping_add/sub/mul instead of checked operations, causing
  integer overflow to wrap instead of promoting to REAL
- did not coerce non-numeric types to numeric before arithmetic

Replaced with SqliteValue::sql_add/sub/mul which correctly implement
SQLite's overflow-to-float promotion, NULL propagation, and type
coercion.

Also fixed:
- Concat (||) now returns NULL when either operand is NULL, matching
  SQLite semantics (was converting NULL to empty string)
- numeric_div uses checked_div with overflow promotion and proper
  float division-by-zero handling
- numeric_mod uses checked_rem and handles NULL propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
